summary_en: 2.5M shares (4.5% of outstanding), ¥5.0B limit, open-market acquisition, May 15, 2026 – March 31, 2027. Rationale: accelerate shareholder returns under five-year investment harvest phase; target 6% DOE via progressive dividend combined with opportunistic buyback.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Treasury Stock Acquisition (acquisition pursuant to Company Law Article 459, Paragraph 1 and articles of incorporation)
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, H.U. Group Holdings' board authorized treasury stock acquisition under Company Law Article 459(1) and the articles of incorporation. The company will acquire up to 2.5 million ordinary shares (4.5% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥5.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange during the period May 15, 2026 through March 31, 2027. The acquisition is framed as a strategic investment in the company itself, forming part of a five-year medium-term plan characterized as the "investment harvest phase" beginning in fiscal 2025. Management states the aim is to strengthen shareholder returns by targeting a 6% return on equity (DOE) through progressive dividend policy combined with active and opportunistic buyback execution.
